construction.panels: Main body panel with a distinct front pocket panel, forming a curved, ergonomic shape.
construction.seams: Tonal stitching visible along the edges of the main body and the front pocket, reinforcing the structure.
construction.closures: One black plastic quick-release buckle on the adjustable strap. Two black coil zippers with black pull tabs: one for the main compartment and one for the smaller front pocket.
construction.details: Adjustable black webbed strap, main zippered compartment, and a smaller exterior zippered pocket on the front.

graphics.content: The word 'FANNIE' in a stylized, flowing script font, followed by a detailed rose graphic with thorns.
graphics.location: Front center of the main body of the fanny pack, positioned below the front zipper pocket.
graphics.size: Approximately 1.75 inches (4.4 cm) in height for the text, with the entire graphic spanning about 5 inches (12.7 cm) in width.
graphics.style: 3D dimensional, raised, matte finish due to embroidery.

branding.primary_logo: A stylized rose with thorns, representing the 'love-hurts' collection aesthetic and serving as a key brand identifier for SkyyRose.
branding.logo_location: Integrated into the front graphic, positioned to the right of the 'FANNIE' text.

fabric_appearance: Smooth, slightly textured faux leather for the main body, with a matte finish. The strap is a standard matte webbed material.
unique_features: The product name 'FANNIE' is prominently embroidered on the front, paired with the distinctive 'love-hurts' rose graphic, making it a signature piece for the collection.
collection_aesthetic: This piece embodies the 'Oakland luxury streetwear' aesthetic of SkyyRose, combining a classic streetwear item with a sophisticated, dark luxury feel through its black faux leather and intricate, emotionally charged 'love-hurts' rose graphic. It reflects an expression of raw emotion within a high-fashion context.
